description_long: This is a freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark, almost black base and a contrasting natural wood top. The front features two panel doors with round knobs and two upper drawers with cup-style handles, providing both concealed and semi-concealed storage. The sides and back are solid panels, with the back lacking any openings or hardware. The wood grain on the top is visible, adding a rustic touch, while the base has a matte, painted finish. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs and appears robust enough for use in garages, workshops, or as a utility piece in urban environments. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the overall design is functional and classic.
description: A sturdy, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark base, natural wood top, two front doors, and two drawers, designed for practical storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two panel doors with round knobs and two upper drawers with cup handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, flat panel with no hardware or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid, flat panel matching the left side, no hardware or openings.
